Hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform built for elite fitness coaches to manage clients, deliver plans, and grow revenue.

PainPoints.subtitle: Whether you're a coach managing clients or someone chasing personal goals — these problems are holding you back.

01.title: Sending Plans on WhatsApp
01.sub: Plans get buried. Clients ghost. You chase.

02.title: No Idea What You're Actually Eating
02.sub: Guesswork meals. Zero clarity. No progress.

06.title: Tracking Reps in Your Notes App

07.title: No Way to Know If Clients Follow Their Plans
07.sub: You guess. They drift. Results disappear.

FeatureShowcase.badge: Everything You Need. Nothing You Don't
FeatureShowcase.subtitle: Built for coaches who demand more and individuals who refuse to settle

01.title: Full Client Dashboard
01.description: Add unlimited clients, view their profiles, goals, health info, and history — all in one place. No spreadsheets. No chaos.

02.title: Smart Nutrition Planning
02.description: Build custom meal plans with automatic calorie and macro calculation. Day-by-day, meal-by-meal, tailored to every client's goal.

03.title: AI-Powered Meal Suggestions
03.description: Let AI generate a full nutrition plan in seconds based on your client's calories, allergies, and preferences. You review, adjust, and send.

04.title: Custom Workout Programs
04.description: Build weekly training programs from a full exercise library. Sets, reps, rest time, and coaching notes — all in one builder.

05.title: Client Progress Tracking
05.description: Log weekly check-ins, body measurements, and progress photos. Visual charts show every client's transformation over time.

06.title: Client Portal & PDF Export
06.description: Send clients a personal portal link to view their plans. Export any plan as a professional branded PDF instantly.

01.title: Know Exactly What You Eat
01.description: Log your meals daily and see your calories, protein, carbs, and fat in real time. Stop guessing. Start knowing.

02.title: Your Personal Meal Plan
02.description: Get a meal plan built around your goal — whether it's fat loss, muscle gain, or maintenance. Calculated just for you.

03.title: Structured Workout Programs
03.description: Follow a weekly workout plan built for your level and goals. Every exercise, set, and rep — laid out clearly.

04.title: Log Every Rep. Every Set.
04.description: Track your weights and reps for every workout session. See yourself getting stronger week after week.

05.title: See Your Transformation
05.description: Log your weight, measurements, and progress photos weekly. Visual charts show how far you've come.

06.title: Stay Consistent. Hit Your Goals.
06.description: Set weekly targets for water, steps, sleep, and workouts. Build habits that actually stick.

01.title: Manage All Your Clients
01.description: One dashboard for every client — plans, progress, check-ins, and messages. No more WhatsApp chaos.

02.title: Nutrition & Workouts
02.description: Generate custom meal and workout plans in seconds. Calories, macros, and sets — all calculated automatically.

03.title: Real Progress. Real Results.
03.description: Track weight, measurements, and performance over time. See the data. Stay motivated. Never guess again.
